Playstyle / Strategy Notes: Chaotic. Massive variance. Constantly slicing into the right rough and skulling chips over the green.
The aggressive amateur. Tries to crush the ball, resulting in a consistent fade/slice miss. High roll-out.
The conservative amateur. Hits it straight but has a terrible habit of hitting it "fat" and chunking approaches short.
Surgical. Uses high-spin equipment and precision focus to stick approaches close to the pin.
